mapper.sql: id, name, com_rate, five_free, adress, telephone, sh_account, sz_account, created_time, updated_time
mapper.insert: insert into broker (id, name, com_rate, five_free, adress, telephone, sh_account, sz_account, created_time, updated_time) values (#{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{comRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{fiveFree,jdbcType=BIT}, #{adress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{shAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{szAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.update:
update broker
name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
com_rate = #{comRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL},
five_free = #{fiveFree,jdbcType=BIT},
adress = #{adress,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
telephone = #{telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sh_account = #{shAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
sz_account = #{szAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}

update broker set name = #{name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, com_rate = #{comRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, five_free = #{fiveFree,jdbcType=BIT}, adress = #{adress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, telephone = #{telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sh_account = #{shAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, sz_account = #{szAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, created_time = #{createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, updated_time = #{updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}
mapper.insert:
insert into broker (id, name, com_rate, five_free, adress, telephone, sh_account, sz_account, created_time, updated_time) values
(#{item.id,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.name,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.comRate,jdbcType=DECIMAL}, #{item.fiveFree,jdbcType=BIT}, #{item.adress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.telephone,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.shAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.szAccount,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{item.createdTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{item.updatedTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP})
mapper.delete:
delete from broker where id in
#{item}
